original_title: Layout shift: late-loading banner pushes content down
original_description: A promotional banner loads 1.5 seconds after page render and injects itself below the nav without reserved space. All page content shifts down by ~120px. This is a poor CLS score and frustrating for users who are mid-scroll.

console.message: [UI] Content layout shift detected — banner injected without reserved space
[UI] CLS score exceeded threshold: elements shifted by ~120px

metadata.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/[REDACTED-IP] Safari/537.36
